prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, engineer a selective protein binder targeting V antigen (LcrV) (bacterial type III secretion needle tip protein (select agent)) expressed by Yersinia pestis. The binder should achieve picomolar binding. describe a strategy for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ColabFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
